studyName: Contribution of Systemic and Somatic Factors to Clinical Response and Resistance in Urothelial Cancer

variables.name: 5-factor Score
variables.description: Prognostic Classification of Patients Receiving Salvage Systemic Therapy for Advanced Urothelial Carcinoma

variables.name: Age_onset
variables.description: Age at start of therapy

variables.name: Albumin less than 4
variables.description: Albumin less than 4 g/dL at treatment start

variables.name: Alive Status
variables.description: Alive at the time of final chart review

variables.name: Bajorin Risk Score
variables.description: Prognostic Classification of Patients Receiving Front-Line for Advanced Urothelial Carcinoma

variables.name: Best OR
variables.description: Best response per RECIST 1.1

variables.name: ECOG greater than 0
variables.description: ECOG performance status greater than 0 at treatment start

variables.name: Hb less than 10
variables.description: Hemoglobin less than 10 g/dL at treatment start

variables.name: Liver Mets
variables.description: Liver metastases present at treatment start

variables.name: OS
variables.description: Overall survival

variables.name: Ongoing Responder
variables.description: Ongoing responder per RECIST 1.1 at the time of final chart review

variables.name: PD-L1 IC Score
variables.description: The PD-L1 tumor-infiltrating immune cell (IC) status defined by the percentage of PD-L1 positive ICs in the tumor microenvironment by immunohistochemistry using the SP142 assay (Ventana, AZ, USA)

variables.name: PFS
variables.description: Progression free survival per RECIST 1.1

variables.name: Perioperative chemo_POD within 12 months
variables.description: Previous perioperative chemotherapy, with first progression within 12 months

variables.name: Prior BCG
variables.description: History of prior intravesical BCG treatment

variables.name: Prior Lines
variables.description: Number of previous systemic regimens in the metastatic setting

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: De-identified Subject ID

variables.name: Sex
variables.description: Gender of participant

variables.name: Smoking
variables.description: Prior smoking history

variables.name: Still on Treatment
variables.description: Still on study therapy at the time of final chart review

variables.name: TFLC less than 3mo
variables.description: Time from last chemotherapy less than 3 months

variables.name: Visceral Mets
variables.description: Visceral metastases presents at treatment start

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte Type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: LOCATION_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Metastasis location

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor or metastasis

variables.name: PRIMARY_TUMOR_LOCATION
variables.description: Primary tumor location

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified Sample ID

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where samples originate

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SUBJECT_SOURCE
variables.description: Source repository where subjects originate
